bead.title: checks: backfill production-reachability — cmd (69 unreached)
bead.description:
Decomposed from REACH-BACKFILL (ddx-83440482). The Go production-reachability check (library/checks/go-production-reachability) flagged 69 symbol(s) in package `cmd` as unreachable from cli/ entry roots (deadcode RTA).

Symbols:
- cmd/agent_cmd.go:858 — harnessHealthyViaService
- cmd/agent_cmd.go:1986 — CommandFactory.executeLoopWithServer
- cmd/agent_execute_bead.go:22 — loadExecutionsMirrorConfig
- cmd/agent_metrics.go:349 — computeReviewOutcomes
- cmd/agent_usage.go:246 — aggregateUsage
- cmd/agent_usage.go:289 — aggregateUsageAggs
- cmd/agent_usage.go:480 — readUsageSessionRecords
- cmd/command_factory.go:84 — NewCommandFactoryWithViper

- cmd/config.go:143 — runConfig
- cmd/config.go:387 — getConfigValueWithWorkingDir

- cmd/config.go:455 — showConfigFiles

- cmd/errors.go:75 — CheckNoConfig

- cmd/root.go:48 — getLibraryPath
- cmd/test_harness.go:17 — WithIsolatedDirectory
- cmd/test_harness.go:29 — GetCommandInDirectory
- cmd/test_harness.go:49 — NewTestHarness
- cmd/test_harness.go:83 — TestHarness.WithTempDir
- cmd/test_harness.go:96 — TestHarness.WithEnv
- cmd/test_harness.go:119 — TestHarness.NewCommand
- cmd/test_harness.go:131 — TestHarness.Execute
- cmd/test_harness.go:151 — TestHarness.ExecuteAndCheck
- cmd/test_harness.go:159 — TestHarness.Output
- cmd/test_harness.go:164 — TestHarness.ErrOutput
- cmd/test_harness.go:169 — TestHarness.CombinedOutput
- cmd/test_harness.go:174 — TestHarness.WriteFile
- cmd/test_harness.go:190 — TestHarness.MkdirAll
- cmd/test_harness.go:198 — TestHarness.FileExists
- cmd/test_harness.go:204 — TestHarness.SetupDDxProject
- cmd/test_harness.go:222 — TestHarness.Cleanup
- cmd/test_harness.go:232 — TestHarness.WithProjectFile
- cmd/test_harness.go:239 — TestHarness.WithDDxConfig

- cmd/test_harness.go:252 — TestHarness.AssertOutputNotContains
- cmd/test_harness.go:258 — TestHarness.AssertFileExists
- cmd/test_harness.go:264 — TestHarness.AssertFileNotExists
- cmd/update.go:203 — isInitializedInDir
- cmd/update.go:212 — loadConfigFromWorkingDirForUpdate
- cmd/update.go:225 — validateUpdateStrategy
- cmd/update.go:247 — checkForUpdatesInDir
- cmd/update.go:258 — previewUpdateInDir
- cmd/update.go:274 — synchronizeWithUpstreamInDir
- cmd/update.go:284 — detectConflictsInDir

- cmd/update.go:397 — handleInteractiveResolutionInDir

For each: WIRE (add to production call graph) or DELETE (genuinely obsolete). If neither is clear within ~15 min, annotate `// wiring:pending <follow-up-bead-id>` and file a follow-up bead.

Decision rule: if the originating bead's AC describes desired runtime behavior → WIRE; if speculative or design has moved on → DELETE.

Initial-violations evidence: .ddx/executions/20260503T124553-282667f7/initial-violations.json
bead.acceptance:
1. Each of the 69 listed symbols is either wired into the production call graph reachable from main() OR deleted (with originating bead reopened/closed-as-obsolete as appropriate).
2. Any remaining wiring:pending annotations cite open follow-up beads.
3. After landing: deadcode RTA (`go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./...` from cli/) reports zero remaining dead symbols in `cmd`.
4. cd cli && go test ./... green.
5. Decisions log written to .ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md (one line per symbol: WIRE|DELETE|PENDING <reason>).
